identity.name: The Swiss Vault
identity.aesthetic: Swiss International Style meets Modern Fintech. High contrast, grid-based, whitespace-heavy but data-dense.

usage_rules.headings: Use Manrope for all headings. Letter-spacing: -0.02em for sizes above 24px. Weights: 600 (SemiBold) or 800 (ExtraBold).
usage_rules.body: Public Sans for all UI text. Excellent legibility at small sizes.
usage_rules.numbers: Use tabular-nums class for all data tables and financial figures.

usage.secondary_action: bg-white hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 shadow-sm

cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

tables.header: h-12 px-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-muted-foreground bg-slate-50/50

buttons.base: inline-flex items-center justify-center whitespace-nowrap rounded-md text-sm font-medium ring-offset-background transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50

variants.default: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-4 py-2
variants.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

images.logo_placeholder: Use a simple typographic logo 'CA.OS' in Manrope font.

universal_guidelines: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds, keep it flat and clean.
Use 'shadcn/ui' components as the base but customize spacing to be more generous.
Always include error handling in API calls.

login.layout: Split screen. Left: Branding/Image. Right: Form.

tasks.layout: Full width table with filter bar (Search, Status, Assignee, Date Range)

instructions_to_main_agent.2: Setup 'Manrope' and 'Public Sans' via Google Fonts in index.css.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: Implement the sidebar layout as the main Layout wrapper.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: Use the provided color palette in tailwind.config.js.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Focus on 'Density' for tables but 'Airiness' for the overall page layout.
